crime.value: Multiple murders including Alice's parents, butler, and eventually Alice and the Queen
crime.quote: both your parents were killed yesterday

victim.value: Alice (princess/royal heir) and her family members targeted for their royal status
victim.quote: you think this is how my father the real King would treat me!

closed_world.value: Royal household and castle environment with limited staff and access
closed_world.quote: no one else was in the house

culprit_and_motive.value: The maid, motivated by unknown reasons to eliminate the royal family
culprit_and_motive.quote: The maid starring at there cold dead bodies and laughs

suspect_architecture.value: Single primary suspect (the maid) with false misdirection toward multiple deaths appearing random
suspect_architecture.quote: the crazy maid sneaked in though the top of the doorway

red_herring.value: Initial murder report of parents being killed, when they are actually alive
red_herring.quote: both your parents were killed yesterday

social_world.value: Royal hierarchy with King, Queen, Princess Alice, and servants (maid, butlers) in positions of service and access
social_world.quote: your father the real King would treat me

reveal_mechanic.value: Revelation through the maid's final presence at the death scene, laughing over the bodies
reveal_mechanic.quote: The maid starring at there cold dead bodies and laughs

investigator_wound.value: Alice as victim-investigator, psychologically vulnerable through amnesia and family trauma
investigator_wound.quote: Alice Sat up from her bed forgotten everything about the night before

_meta.title: ebook zema zuruki the sad end
